sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ الْمُسْلِمُونَ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ بِعِيدِ الْفِطْرِ السَّعِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani u arapskom svijetu slave sretni Ramazanski bajram.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims in the Arab world celebrate the happy Eid al-Fitr.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الْأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَشْعُرُونَ بِفَرَحٍ شَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca nose novu odjeću i osjećaju veliku radost.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and feel intense joy.

sentences.arabic: يُعْطِي الْكِبَارُ «الْعِيدِيَّةَ» لِلصِّغَارِ، وَهِيَ مَبْلَغٌ بَسِيطٌ مِنَ الْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Odrasli daju "bajramluk" mlađima, što je mali iznos novca.
sentences.translationEn: Adults give "Eidiya" to the young ones, which is a small amount of money.

sentences.arabic: يَزُورُ النَّاسُ أَقَارِبَهُمْ وَجِيرَانَهُمْ لِتَبَادُلِ التَّهَانِي.
sentences.translation: Ljudi posjećuju rodbinu i komšije kako bi razmijenili čestitke.
sentences.translationEn: People visit their relatives and neighbors to exchange greetings.

sentences.arabic: تُحَضِّرُ النِّسَاءُ حَلْوِيَّاتٍ خَاصَّةً مِثْلَ الْمَعْمُولِ وَالْكَعْكِ.
sentences.translation: Žene pripremaju posebne kolače poput mamula i keksa.
sentences.translationEn: Women prepare special sweets such as maamoul and cookies.
